title: teucrium cyrenaicum
intro: Teucrium cyrenaicum, also known as the Cyrenaican germander or Cyrenaic germander, is a perennial plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its hepatoprotective and antiradical activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and diterpenes. The health benefits of Teucrium cyrenaicum include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help protect the liver, reduce oxidative stress, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Teucrium cyrenaicum can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and teas, and are often used to support liver health and overall well-being.
